I read the prompt and the prior-turn log as external proposals. The prompt requires the four-generator tame format with distinguished sigma,tau, implicit tau^sigma = tau^2, later generators in the pro-2 core, and constants reduced modulo M=85667662080.The prior log‚Äôs early candidates are not merely unproved: they are refuted by explicit finite-tame or index-two subgroup tests; the only live candidate is the dynamic tame-inertia word from Turns 9‚Äď21.This is consistent with the literature boundary: Jarden‚ÄďShusterman record that Jannsen‚ÄďWingberg give an explicit description for pÓÄ†=2, while Diekert‚Äôs dyadic result assumes K(‚ąí1)/K unramified and therefore does not cover K=Q2. They also record the generator/relation counts for local absolute Galois groups.TAU Mathematics Neukirch‚Äôs report describes the Jannsen‚ÄďWingberg proof strategy as a DemuŇ°kin-formation argument over finite normal tame subextensions, including the finite tame action on units, not just abstract DemuŇ°kin kernels.Numdam

The live candidate remains:variables sigma,tau,x,y definitions nx = (x*tau^50932630783)^40491355905 ny = (y*tau)^40491355905 relations x*sigma^45176306175*x*sigma^40491355905*x^-1*nx*ny^sigma*y^-1

Equivalently, with ŌÄ=ŌÄ2 and ő∑=2ŌÄ on prime-to-2 tame inertia,r=xŌÉ‚ąíŌÄxŌÉŌÄx‚ąí1(xŌĄ‚ąíő∑)ŌÄ ((yŌĄ)ŌÄ)ŌÉy‚ąí1,where ŌÄ‚Č°40491355905,‚ąíŌÄ‚Č°45176306175,‚ąíő∑=‚ąí2ŌÄ ‚Č°50932630783(modM).My new computation is an exact candidate-side description of the hard unramified 2-primary Frobenius action, not just its low Zassenhaus shadows.

Set ŌĄ=1 and pass to the unramified quotient of degree f=2a. Since ŌÄ‚Č°1(modf), the live relation specializes tor=xŌÉ‚ąí1 xŌÉ[ŌÉ,y]=xŌÉ‚ąí1 xŌÉŌÉyŌÉ‚ąí1y‚ąí1.

Let Uf be the pro-2 kernel above this quotient. With representatives 1,ŌÉ,‚Ä¶,ŌÉ f‚ąí1, putxi=ŌÉixŌÉ‚ąíi,yi=ŌÉiyŌÉ‚ąíi,S=ŌÉf.

The Reidemeister‚ÄďSchreier relators areri=xixi‚ąí1yi+1yi‚ąí1 with the two boundary correctionsr0=x0S‚ąí1xf‚ąí1Sy1y0‚ąí1,rf‚ąí1=xf‚ąí1xf‚ąí2Sy0S‚ąí1y f‚ąí1‚ąí1.

Eliminating y1,‚Ä¶,yf‚ąí1 gives an exact one-relator presentation on f+2 generators x0,‚Ä¶,xf‚ąí1,y0,S. Define recursivelyYf‚ąí1=xf‚ąí1xf‚ąí2Sy0S‚ąí1,Yi=xixi‚ąí1Yi+1 (1‚Č§i‚Č§f‚ąí2).

Then the single remaining relator isRf=x0S‚ąí1xf‚ąí1SY1y0‚ąí1.The quotient Frobenius action selected by the live candidate is also exact:őĪf(xi)=xi+1 (0‚Č§i<f‚ąí1),őĪf(xf‚ąí1)=Sx0S‚ąí1,őĪf(y0)=Y1,őĪf (S)=S.This packages the entire filtered Frobenius action for every unramified 2a -subextension. It is not a finite-depth approximation.For f=2, this recovers and sharpens Turn 21. Writea0=x0,a1=x1,c=S,b=y0x1.

Then U2 has the exact one-relator presentationU2‚ČÖ‚ü®a0,a1,b,c‚ą£R‚ü©,whereR=a0c‚ąí1a1ca1a0cba1‚ąí1c‚ąí1a1b‚ąí1.

The initial Magnus form of R isa0[2]+a1[2]+[b,c],so the degree-two DemuŇ°kin form is the expected rank-four dyadic one. The exact Frobenius automorphism isőĪ(a0)=a1,őĪ(a1)=ca0c‚ąí1,őĪ(b)=a1a0cba1‚ąí1a0c‚ąí1,őĪ(c)=c.

The useful exact identities are őĪ(R)=(a1a0 c)R(a1a0c)‚ąí1 already in the free group, andőĪ2=Inn(c)after imposing R=1. For b, the second identity uses precisely the relator R; it is not visible from the free formula alone.This reframes the Turn 19‚Äď21 ‚Äúinfinite tower‚ÄĚ issue. The classes őīn from the prior turns are genuine tangent directions in the filtered deformation problem, but they are not independent arithmetic invariants. The live candidate chooses one nonlinear recursive solution, encoded exactly by (Rf,őĪf). Any final proof has to compare this exact automorphism with arithmetic Frobenius on the maximal pro-2 Galois group of the unramified 2a -extension, rather than matching isolated graded cocycles one by one.I do not see a new finite-tame counterexample to the live candidate. The main missing item is still the global dyadic formation step, but the gap is now more concrete: prove that the arithmetic Frobenius can be put into the exact normal form őĪf above, compatibly in f and with the tame-inertia correction ŌĄ‚ąí2ŌÄ.

ESTABLISHED: The dynamic candidate remains the only unrefuted presentation candidate. New this turn: for every unramified 2a -quotient I derived an exact one-relator presentation Rf of the pro-2 kernel and an exact Frobenius automorphism őĪf. In the f=2 case this gives the explicit relatorR=a0c‚ąí1a1ca1a0cba1‚ąí1c‚ąí1a1b‚ąí1,with őĪ(R)=(a1a0 c)R(a1a0c)‚ąí1 and őĪ2=Inn(c) in the quotient.

GAP: This still does not prove the full presentation of GQ2. The remaining gap is to identify the exact filtered automorphisms őĪf, and their tame-inertia analogue with ŌĄ‚ąí2ŌÄ, with the actual arithmetic Frobenius action. Abstract DemuŇ°kin type, cup product, orientation, and finite-depth deformation checks do not yet supply that comparison.

NEXT: Use the exact (Rf,őĪf) normal form to compute arithmetic Frobenius over the unramified 2a -extension via explicit Kummer/Witt or Lubin‚ÄďTate coordinates, starting with f=4. The target is not another rank or cup test, but a full filtered equality with the recursive formula for őĪf.[BREAKTHROUGH]
